banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: An individual renewing a standard (non-conditional) passenger car's registration online, keeping the same term and usage type, with CTP already held and no safety inspection required.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: All five online-renewal eligibility gates are false, so the flow falls through to the vehicle-lookup step rather than exiting to an in-person service centre.

collectedValues.label: Has the vehicle been unregistered for more than 3 months?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'the vehicle has been unregistered for more than 3 months – you'll need to re-register it'

collectedValues.label: Did you order special number plates within the registration renewal period, and have you not yet received them?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'you ordered special number plates within the registration renewal period, and you have not received the new plates yet'

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle registered under the Common Expiry Date (CED) Scheme?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'the vehicle is registered under the Common Expiry Date (CED) Scheme'

collectedValues.label: If this is a conditionally registered (non-standard) vehicle, does its renewal require an inspection?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'the vehicle is conditionally registered and requires an inspection'

collectedValues.label: If this is a conditionally registered (non-standard) vehicle, does it require changes to its operating conditions?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'the vehicle is conditionally registered and requires changes to the operating conditions'

collectedValues.label: Enter a NSW plate number or billing number
collectedValues.sourceRef: registration-renewal.service.nsw.gov.au/find-vehicle (live, 2026-07-04) — 'Enter a NSW plate number or billing number.'

collectedValues.label: Is this a conditional registration (non-standard vehicle)?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Note — 'When renewing a conditional registration (non-standard vehicle) online...'

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle a trailer or caravan?
collectedValues.sourceRef: What you need — 'A compulsory third party (CTP) insurance policy, commonly called a green slip (unless the vehicle is a trailer, caravan, or has a conditional registration).'

collectedValues.label: Do you want to change the registration term at this renewal?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Introduction — 'While renewing you may be able to make changes to details like your usage type and the registration term.'

collectedValues.label: Do you want to change the vehicle's usage type at this renewal?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Introduction — 'While renewing you may be able to make changes to details like your usage type and the registration term.'

collectedValues.label: Does your renewal notice show that a safety inspection (pink slip) is required?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Light vehicles and safety inspections — inspection requirement rules

collectedValues.label: How do you want to pay?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Payment and fees — 'How to pay: BPAY... In person...' (card_online inferred by analogy — see VERIFICATION.md)

collectedValues.label: Do you hold a NSW Pensioner Concession Card?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Rebates and concessions — 'Pensioner Concession Card holders'

collectedValues.label: Would you like to make a voluntary contribution to offset the vehicle's carbon emissions?
collectedValues.sourceRef: More information — voluntary carbon-offset contribution during renewal

documentsRequired.label: Compulsory third party (CTP) insurance policy (green slip)
documentsRequired.reason: Neither isConditionalRegistration nor vehicleIsTrailerOrCaravan is true, so a separate CTP policy is required.

notSubmitted: This packet is a review artifact only. GovSchema never submits a government form or transaction — see GOVERNANCE.md.
